testcase.name: test_get_me_unauthenticated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_companies.py:189: in test_get_me_unauthenticated assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_company_unauthenticated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_companies.py:282: in test_create_company_unauthenticated assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_company_by_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_companies.py:303: in test_get_company_by_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get company failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get company failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
